query:
Research the company "saputo".

Research [COMPANY_NAME] to identify: recent quarterly earnings misses or guidance reductions, full-year or quarterly revenue/profit performance gaps, new CEO appointments or strategic review announcements, recent product platform launches or expansion initiatives, current production capacity utilization rates or expansion projects, pricing strategy changes, distribution channel additions or expansions, recent margin pressure or cost-cutting announcements, current scale/annual revenue (focus on Fortune 500 or $10B+ companies), and industry (prioritize automotive, consumer goods, CPG, manufacturing sectors with complex multi-function operations).

Focus on the last 6 months. Return a comprehensive summary with specific facts, numbers, and dates.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
Saputo Inc. is a top-ten global dairy processor operating at a massive scale, reporting US$12.62 billion in full-year fiscal 2026 revenue. Over the last six months, the company has faced top-line revenue headwinds and a recent Q4 earnings miss driven by lower U.S. dairy commodity prices, prompting CEO Carl Colizza to announce a strategic shift toward proactive M&A and portfolio optimization, including the divestiture of its Argentina division. To combat margin pressures, Saputo is executing targeted European price increases, consolidating UK manufacturing operations, and aggressively expanding its higher-margin foodservice product portfolio and distribution channels.

**Financial Performance and Scale**
Saputo operates within the consumer packaged goods (CPG) and complex manufacturing sectors as one of the world's top ten global dairy processors [Saputo Inc.: Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Year-End Results | Saputo](https://newsroom.saputo.com/news-releases/news-release-details/saputo-inc-fiscal-2026-fourth-quarter-and-year-end-results?mobile=1). Its product portfolio spans cheese, fluid milk, extended shelf-life products, cultured products, and dairy ingredients [Shareholder Reports 2026 | Investors | Saputo](https://www.saputo.com/en/investors/shareholder-reports/2026). 
*   **Annual Scale:** For the full fiscal year 2026, Saputo reported total revenues of US$12.62 billion (approximately CAD 17.551 billion), representing a 1.5% year-over-year decrease [Saputo reports revenue of US$12.6B in FY 2026 | Dairy Business Middle East & Africa](https://dairybusinessmea.com/2026/06/05/saputo-reports-revenue-of-us12-6b-in-fy-2026/).
*   **Q4 FY2026 Performance:** The company experienced a significant performance gap in Q4, reporting an adjusted EPS of CAD 0.41, which missed analyst expectations of CAD 0.4675 (a 12.3% negative surprise) [Earnings call transcript: Saputo Q4 2026 results miss expectations By Investing.com](https://ca.investing.com/news/stock-market-news/earnings-call-transcript-saputo-q4-2026-results-miss-expectations-93CH-4678000). Q4 revenue declined 6% year-over-year, primarily due to lower U.S. dairy commodity prices [Earnings call transcript: Saputo Q4 2026 results miss expectations By Investing.com](https://ca.investing.com/news/stock-market-news/earnings-call-transcript-saputo-q4-2026-results-miss-expectations-93CH-4678000).
*   **Prior Quarters:** Saputo consistently missed revenue targets throughout the year despite some bottom-line beats. Q3 FY2026 revenue came in at CAD 4.9 billion (missing the CAD 4.99 billion projection and declining 2% YoY), though adjusted EPS of CAD 0.57 beat forecasts by 5.79% [Earnings call transcript: Saputo Q3 2026 sees EPS beat, revenue miss By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputo-q3-2026-sees-eps-beat-revenue-miss-93CH-4491094). Similarly, Q2 FY2026 revenue of CAD 4.72 billion missed the CAD 4.78 billion forecast, alongside an EPS beat [Earnings call transcript: Saputo Q2 2025 shows EPS beat, revenue miss By Investing.com](https://ca.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputo-q2-2025-shows-eps-beat-revenue-miss-93CH-4301700).

**Strategic Shifts and Leadership**
*   **M&A and Divestitures:** CEO Carl Colizza has signaled a strategic pivot toward proactive mergers and acquisitions to accelerate international market penetration, noting that organic growth alone is insufficient [Saputo CEO Opens M&A Door To Global Dairy Growth - EDairy News English](https://en.edairynews.com/saputo-ceo-opens-ma-door-to-global-dairy-growth/). Concurrently, Saputo is streamlining its existing portfolio by selling an 80% stake in its Argentina dairy division to Gloria Foods (Grupo Gloria), expected to close in the first half of fiscal 2027 [Saputo Q4 Earnings Call Highlights](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/saputo-q4-earnings-call-highlights-140341056.html).
*   **Board Additions:** Linda Mantia was appointed to the Board of Directors on March 26, 2026 [Press Release Distribution and Management](https://www.globenewswire.com/search/organization/saputo%20inc%C2%A7).

**Margin Pressures, Pricing, and Cost-Cutting**
*   **Cost Optimization:** Saputo is actively consolidating its UK operations to improve fuel efficiency and optimize costs, which includes the planned mid-2026 closure of a cutting operation in Kirby Malzard [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383). The company previously incurred CAD 6 million in restructuring costs during H1 FY2026 to cease manufacturing certain functional dairy ingredients in the UK [Saputo Reports Financial Results for the Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026 Ended September 30, 2025 | Saputo](https://newsroom.saputo.com/news-releases/news-release-details/saputo-reports-financial-results-second-quarter-fiscal-2026).
*   **Pricing Strategy:** To combat inflationary pressures and elevated milk input costs, Saputo implemented targeted price increases across its European sector [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383). 
*   **Margin Outlook:** Management has set a long-term objective for the U.S. platform to achieve high single-digit to double-digit EBITDA margins [Saputo Q3 Earnings Call Highlights - Daily Political](https://www.dailypolitical.com/2026/02/10/saputo-q3-earnings-call-highlights.html). A new U.S. federal milk marketing order pricing formula, effective June 1, 2026, is expected to positively contribute to margin structures in future quarters [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383).
*   **Capital Expenditures:** CapEx is projected to increase significantly to approximately CAD 550 million in fiscal 2027, up from CAD 339 million in fiscal 2026 [Saputo Q4 Earnings Call Highlights - The Globe and Mail](https://www.theglobeandmail.com/investing/markets/stocks/SAP-T/pressreleases/2339871/saputo-q4-earnings-call-highlights/).

**Product Innovation and Distribution Expansion**
Saputo has launched an aggressive pipeline of new products and distribution partnerships over the last six months to capture higher-margin categories:
*   **Foodservice & Beverage Enhancements:** Saputo USA launched "Saputo cold foam" (French Vanilla, Sweet Créme, Caramel Macchiato) targeting the coffee market [Saputo USA Showcasing Variety of New and Classic Dairy Products at IDDBA 2026; Nycole Rezutek Comments | Deli Market News](https://www.delimarketnews.com/well-paired/saputo-usa-showcasing-variety-new-and-classic-dairy-products-iddba-2026-nycole-rezutek-comments/deli-staff/tue-05262026-0828/21640). The company also introduced a specialized mozzarella and smoked gouda blend for chefs [Saputo USA launches three new products | Dairy Foods](https://www.dairyfoods.com/articles/98976-saputo-usa-launches-three-new-products], portion control (PC) creamers for the foodservice sector [Saputo USA launches three new products | Dairy Foods](https://www.dairyfoods.com/articles/98976-saputo-usa-launches-three-new-products), and "Saputo Spicy Mozzarella" blended with Habanero Jack [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383).
*   **Retail & Consumer Goods:** In the UK, the Cathedral City brand expanded into chilled prepared meals (Cheesy Mash, Potato Gratin, Cauliflower Cheese, Broccoli Cheese) [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383). In the US, "Cheddar Ella" string cheese was launched under the Cheeseheads brand for the 2026 back-to-school season [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383). Note: The company also initiated a recall of Great Value Cottage Cheese on February 24, 2026, due to health risks [Press Release Distribution and Management](https://www.globenewswire.com/search/organization/saputo%20inc%C2%A7).
*   **Digital Innovation:** Saputo launched "Armstrong Cheese GPT," an AI chatbot providing consumers with recipes, meal inspiration, and coupons [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383).
*   **Distribution Wins:** Management identified convenience and "food away from home" channels as under-penetrated growth opportunities and is actively expanding into them [Earnings call transcript: Saputo Q4 2026 results miss expectations By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputo-q4-2026-results-miss-expectations-93CH-4728723). Recent wins include securing distribution with a leading meal kit provider, a regional QSR chain, and becoming the full pizza cheese supplier for a major international foodservice partner [Earnings call transcript: Saputo’s Q1 2025 shows modest revenue growth By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-saputos-q1-2025-shows-modest-revenue-growth-93CH-4270383).

**Gaps and Limitations**
Based on the provided research findings, the following requested information could not be verified:
*   Specific production capacity utilization rates (e.g., percentage of factory capacity currently in use).
*   Explicit forward-looking guidance reductions for upcoming quarters (only historical misses and long-term margin goals were provided).
*   Details on the specific health risk that prompted the February 2026 Great Value Cottage Cheese recall.
